comment: Declared expected behaviors for the 2026-05-10 reference corpus. Used by per-epic e2e scripts to assert post-overhaul behavior. Memory identities referenced by content_hash (BLAKE3 of normalized content) so this file survives ULID changes across reseeds. Bead bd-17c65.10.2 (J2).

corpus_meta.source: Live walkthrough of v0.1.0 ee binary at /Users/jemanuel/projects/eidetic_engine_cli on 2026-05-10
corpus_meta.comment_on_rejections: Three memories in this corpus are CURRENTLY REJECTED by the pre-overhaul binary (memories 13, 15 by secret detector; 9, 10 by tag validator). Post-C1 + C3, they all persist. Seed helper falls back to --allow-secret-mention for memories tagged 'requires_overhaul' so the seed loop reaches 15/15.

forbidden dependencies.rationale: Literal lexical overlap with stored memory 3. Pre-overhaul: 10 results, all score 0.000, top result is unrelated. Post-B1+B2: literal-match memory ranks top with non-zero score and source=lexical or hybrid.

how do I cut a release safely.rationale: Semantic match to release procedural rules. Pre-overhaul: returned 10 hits, top was clippy rule (correct). Post-overhaul: same shape but with relevance floor honored.

where does JSON go on stdout.rationale: Strong semantic match to CLI conventions memory.

what runtime are we on.rationale: Pre-overhaul top result was FrankenSQLite (storage layer; wrong domain). The expectation is that semantic match should prefer the Asupersync runtime memory; if embed-fast can't distinguish, B5 (synonym blind spots) documents this and emits degraded.weak_query_recall.

what broke in the last release.rationale: Pre-overhaul top was Asupersync runtime fact (irrelevant). Post-overhaul: failure-type memories should rank top OR weak_query_recall surfaces.

policy_acceptance.content_phrase: Context packs must never include secrets
policy_acceptance.rationale: Meta-policy rule must be storable. C1 value-shape detector lets plain-English mentions through.

policy_acceptance.content_phrase: Cancellation test for ee context hung once because Scope::spawn
policy_acceptance.rationale: Cancellation tokens in async runtimes are NOT secrets. C1 detector recognizes only high-entropy value-shapes.

policy_tag_acceptance.rationale: Version-string tag must be accepted post-C3.
Namespace-dot tag must be accepted post-C3.
Spaces are delimiters and remain rejected.
Comma is the tag-list delimiter, rejected.
Slash is path separator in storage, rejected.
Unicode letter is acceptable after NFC normalize.

pack_expectations.rationale: Post-Epic A (pack densification), a 1000-token pack of ~13 items should produce ≤12KB JSON (was ~28KB pre-overhaul). Tests A1, A3, A6.

curation_expectations.rationale: After seeding multiple procedural/rule memories with shared 'cargo' tag and similar level/kind, G3 candidate proposer surfaces ≥1 candidate. The cluster includes the cargo fmt and clippy rules.

auto_link_expectations.rationale: Per G7 decision (honest documentation): auto-link only fires inside workflows. Outside, status is no_workflow_required (a non-failure honest state).
